    <sql id="list_restoreSingoList">

        SELECT COUNT(*)

            <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        ) LIST

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoFileTotalCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT NVL(SUM(
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO)
        ), 0)
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>

    </select>

            , S.C_NO
            , S.STTEMNT_NO
            , S.C_A_TITLE
            , S.C_DATE
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO) AS FILE_CNT
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO AND FQ.FILE_TY = 'I') AS IMAGE_CNT
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO AND FQ.FILE_TY = 'V') AS VIDEO_CNT
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')

            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY S.C_DATE DESC
    </sql>

</mapper>

<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="egov.sia.fileRestoreMng.mapper.FileRestoreMngMapper">

    <resultMap id="fileRestoreMng" type="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.vo.FileSyncMngVO">
        <result property="cNo"   column="C_NO"/>
        <result property="sttemntNo"   column="STTEMNT_NO"/>
        <result property="cATitle"   column="C_A_TITLE"/>
        <result property="cDate"   column="C_DATE"/>
        <result property="fileCnt"   column="FILE_CNT"/>
        <result property="fileQCNo"   column="FILEQ_C_NO"/>
    </resultMap>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoList" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultMap="fileRestoreMng">
        <include refid="CommonMapper.pageHeader" />
        <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        <include refid="CommonMapper.pageFooter" />
    </select>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoListCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM (
            <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        ) LIST
    </select>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoFileTotalCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT NVL(SUM(
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO)
        ), 0)
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

    <sql id="list_restoreSingoList">
        SELECT
            S.C_NO AS FILEQ_C_NO /* �떊怨� 怨좎쑀踰덊샇瑜� fileQCNo�뿉 留ㅽ븨�븯�뿬 �궗�슜 (AtchFileServiceImpl 援ъ“ �샇�솚�슜) */
            , S.C_NO
            , S.STTEMNT_NO
            , S.C_A_TITLE
            , S.C_DATE
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO) AS FILE_CNT
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY S.C_DATE DESC
    </sql>

</mapper>

        SELECT
            S.C_NO AS FILEQ_C_NO /* �떊怨� 怨좎쑀踰덊샇瑜� fileQCNo�뿉 留ㅽ븨�븯�뿬 �궗�슜 (AtchFileServiceImpl 援ъ“ �샇�솚�슜) */

            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO) AS FILE_CNT
            , COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT
            , NVL(SUM((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO)) OVER(), 0) AS TOTAL_FILE_CNT
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')

            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>

            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY S.C_DATE DESC
    </sql>

</mapper>

{"type": "text", "file": {"filePath": "C:\Dev\dev_safetyreport\workspace\sia\src\main\resources\sia\sqlmap\mappers\FileRestoreMng_SQL.xml", "content": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="egov.sia.fileRestoreMng.mapper.FileRestoreMngMapper">

    <resultMap id="fileRestoreMng" type="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.vo.FileSyncMngVO">
        <result property="cNo"       column="C_NO"/>
        <result property="sttemntNo" column="STTEMNT_NO"/>
        <result property="cATitle"   column="C_A_TITLE"/>
        <result property="cDate"     column="C_DATE"/>
        <result property="fileCnt"   column="FILE_CNT"/>
        <result property="fileQCNo"  column="FILEQ_C_NO"/>
    </resultMap>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoList" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultMap="fileRestoreMng">
        <include refid="CommonMapper.pageHeader" />
        <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        <include refid="CommonMapper.pageFooter" />
    </select>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoListCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM (
            <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        ) LIST
    </select>

    <sql id="list_restoreSingoList">
        SELECT
            S.C_NO AS FILEQ_C_NO /* �떊怨� 怨좎쑀踰덊샇瑜� fileQCNo�뿉 留ㅽ븨�븯�뿬 �궗�슜 (AtchFileServiceImpl 援ъ“ �샇�솚�슜) */
            , S.C_NO
            , S.STTEMNT_NO
            , S.C_A_TITLE
            , S.C_DATE
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO) AS FILE_CNT
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY S.C_DATE DESC
    </sql>

</mapper>
", "numLines": 54, "startLine": 1, "totalLines": 54}}

        <result property="cDate"   column="C_DATE"/>
        <result property="fileCnt"   column="FILE_CNT"/>
        <result property="fileQCNo"   column="FILEQ_C_NO"/>
    </resultMap>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoList" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultMap="fileRestoreMng">
        <include refid="CommonMapper.pageHeader" />
        <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />

    </select>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoListCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">

        FROM (
            <include refid="list_restoreSingoList" />
        ) LIST
    </select>

    <select id="selectRestoreSingoFileTotalCnt" parameterType="egov.sia.fileSyncMng.dto.FileSyncMngDto" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT NVL(SUM(
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO)
        ), 0)
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (

                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

    <sql id="list_restoreSingoList">
        SELECT
            S.C_NO AS FILEQ_C_NO /* �떊怨� 怨좎쑀踰덊샇瑜� fileQCNo�뿉 留ㅽ븨�븯�뿬 �궗�슜 (AtchFileServiceImpl 援ъ“ �샇�솚�슜) */
            , S.C_NO
            , S.STTEMNT_NO
            , S.C_A_TITLE
            , S.C_DATE
            , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO) AS FILE_CNT
        FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_SINGO S
        <where>
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM SAFEIDB.TBL_FILEQ FQ WHERE FQ.C_SINGO_NO = S.C_NO
            )
            <if test=' (cFrmDate != "" and cFrmDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ >= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cFrmDate} ||' 000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' (cToDate != "" and cToDate != null)'>
                AND S.C_DATE <![CDATA[ <= ]]> TO_DATE(#{cToDate} ||' 235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24MISS')
            </if>
            <if test=' sttemntNo != "SPP-" and sttemntNo != "EPP-" and sttemntNo != "" and sttemntNo != null '>
                AND S.STTEMNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{sttemntNo} || '%'
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY S.C_DATE DESC
    </sql>

</mapper>
